meta.name: qa-allow-parent-of-protected
meta.description: Exercises the BPF-LSM filesystem deny-within-allow path on Linux (Seatbelt deny rules on macOS). Grants a parent ($HOME) and lists a child as add_deny_access; expects the child to be inaccessible at runtime even though its parent is granted. The opt-in `allow_parent_of_protected: true` is required — without it, the broad parent grant would be rejected at sandbox init because it overlaps nono's own state directory ~/.nono.
